title: rosa × andegavensis hirtella
intro: Rosa × andegavensis hirtella is a hybrid rose plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae, known for its thorny stems and clusters of small, fragrant flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Rosa × andegavensis hirtella has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support women's health and promote overall well-being.
